texts.full_text: 2017 Issue 1336, (16 - 22 March 2017) Previous issue Ahram Weekly Toggle navigation Home egypt economy world opinion press review culture heritage features living sports autos youth EGYPT Is it over? A recent clash between two top Wafdist bodies is dividing the party Al-Badawi Mona El-Nahhas Articles During a tense meeting held on 7 March at the headquarters of the liberal Wafd Party, members of the higher commission exchanged harsh words with Wafdist parliamentary members over the party’s performance in parliament. Two members of the party’s higher Abdel-Alim Dawoud and Tarek Sabak, were highly of the performance of the Wafdist parliamentary bloc. Dawoud and Sabak said that Wafdist MPs do not express the official stance of the party in parliament and that they usually make decisions without consulting Wafdist leaders. texts.full_text: Now, I needallthe products (hundreds) to belong toa new store(store3) that i created onthe website. Obviously, I will not manually edit eachproduct to assignit to the new store but what i was looking into is to write a SQL script (given that it's aone time thing) that will update the productsin the DB. Soon after that i found out that it's more than the commerce_product__storestablethat i would needto update, i would also have to updatethe commerce_promotion__stores and commerce_shipping_method__stores tables.and to make the things more complicated, some tableslike thecommerce_product__stores need itsvalues updated where as with the other ones, i need to add theentries. What better, Drupal way, ways of doing it are out there? Another optionthat ifound was talking about exporting all the products with the views dataexportmodule, modyfing the data asi need it,and the importing it. Any other ways of doing it that are better,that i m notaware of? Any help, asim not that goodwith the moduledevelopment, will be of help.Thank you in advance, and sorry for the long and messy post. Event Highlights: - Attendees: Opened primarily for and their families, fostering reunions among old friends. - Activities & Features: - An informal setting with opportunities for socializing and catching up on shared experiences. - Participation or viewing of the legendary roses tournament.
